untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of order flow microstructure patterns (unusual order flow, liquidity withdrawal, spread widening, correlation shift, skew change), pattern matching against historical extreme volatility episodes, and pattern confidence scoring. These require real-time order book data, cross-asset correlation tracking, and machine learning-based pattern recognition that are not available in the allowed indicator set. Only the volatility percentile trigger (hvol_20 > 60th percentile) can be operationalized from available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate the volatility-percentile component using hvol_20 as a proxy for realized volatility percentile. The 60th percentile trigger was approximated as hvol_20 above a normalized threshold. However, the core signal depends on detecting microstructure precursors and pattern recognition that cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators. A complete implementation would require custom order flow and pattern detection modules outside the allowed indicator vocabulary.
